campaign_metadata.name: Game Studios BDR Outreach - February 2026
recommended_workflow: Import cards to BDR board 'To Do' column
Move first 5 high-priority cards to 'Active' when sending
Move to 'In Review' when follow-up needed
Move to 'Complete' when call booked or passed
